message:
fix(auto-repair): walk ancestor chain in readFileSync path validation (bd-k5q5.8.8)

The readFileSync host callback validates requested paths by canonicalizing
the parent directory and checking if it falls within an allowed read root.
When intermediate directories are missing (e.g. form/index.html where form/
itself doesn't exist), canonicalize(parent) fails and Pattern 2 (missing
asset fallback) never fires — the error propagates as ENOENT before the
repair logic gets a chance.

Fix: replace the single-parent canonicalize with a loop that walks up the
ancestor chain until it finds an existing directory. If that ancestor is
within the workspace root or an allowed extension read root, accept the
original requested path and let Pattern 2 handle the missing file.

This enables graduating the nicobailon-interview-tool form/ stubs: the
extension's server.ts calls readFileSync on form/index.html, form/styles.css,
form/script.js, and 4 theme CSS files at module init time. With the ancestor
walk, Pattern 2 returns type-appropriate empty fallback content for each.

Also removes the 7 manual form/ stub files that are now handled dynamically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
